## 🔧 Maintenance Type
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security updates
- [ ] Testing improvements
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 📋 Description
A clear description of the maintenance task that needs to be performed.

## 🎯 Objectives
What are the specific goals of this maintenance task?
- Objective 1
- Objective 2
- Objective 3

## 🔄 Impact Assessment
- **Breaking changes**: [Yes/No]
- **Downtime required**: [Yes/No]
- **User impact**: [None/Low/Medium/High]
- **Testing required**: [Minimal/Standard/Extensive]

## 📅 Timeline
- **Estimated effort**: [e.g. 1 hour, 1 day, 1 week]
- **Target completion**: [Date]
- **Dependencies**: [Any prerequisites]

## 🔍 Technical Details
Provide technical details about the maintenance task:
- Components affected
- Files to be modified
- Database changes (if any)
- Configuration changes

## ✅ Completion Criteria
- [ ] All code changes implemented
- [ ] Tests updated and passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Performance verified
- [ ] Security review completed (if applicable)

## 📊 Success Metrics
How will we measure the success of this maintenance task?
- Metric 1
- Metric 2
- Metric 3

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have reviewed the impact of this maintenance task
- [ ] I have identified all affected components
- [ ] I have planned for testing and validation
- [ ] I have considered rollback procedures
